name: emergencymode-news
description: emergencymode.news scripts, Notebooks and WordPress customizations

scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run eslint && npm run notebooks:check-clean
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:js && npm run test:php && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:php: if command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1; then XDEBUG_MODE=off vendor/bin/phpunit; else echo 'PHP not available - skipping PHP tests'; fi
scripts.test:php:coverage: if command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1; then XDEBUG_MODE=coverage vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-html=coverage/php --coverage-text; else echo 'PHP not available - skipping PHP coverage'; fi
scripts.test:scripts: for test in tests/scripts/test-*.sh; do [ "$(basename $test)" != "test-helpers.sh" ] && $test || true; done
